name: fastapi-skill
description: Expert FastAPI REST API development, testing, deployment, and optimization skill. Use when building APIs with FastAPI, designing Pydantic models, implementing JWT/OAuth2 auth, deploying to Docker/Azure Functions/Container Apps, or optimizing async Python API performance.

name: nicegui-ui
description: Python UI development skill using the NiceGUI framework. Provides components, layouts, async patterns, data binding, auth, integrations, and testing guidance for building NiceGUI apps.
